---
mode: agent
description: Score a learner agent's transfer task response against the three KLI hypotheses and produce a finding for Rulebook Section 14
---

[agents/transfer-task-scorer.md](../../agents/transfer-task-scorer.md)

Score the transfer task using the agent definition above.

**Attach before running:**
- The lab tech spec (for the Transfer Task section)
- The learner's env-eval report (for the Transfer Task Response section)

Output saves to `labs/reports/{lab-name}-transfer-v{N}.md`.
